'''ât-ng-v-sh''' ('''katangveshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:championize|championize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ng-v-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:championize|championize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-ng-v-sh
|-
! Lemma
| katangveshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitangveshoko|thitangveshoko]] || [[word:jitangveshoko|jitangveshoko]] || [[word:shitangveshoko|shitangveshoko]] || [[word:kitangveshoko|kitangveshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutangveshoko|thuthutangveshoko]] || [[word:jujutangveshoko|jujutangveshoko]] || [[word:shushutangveshoko|shushutangveshoko]] || [[word:kukutangveshoko|kukutangveshoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
